name: Ao'nung
description:
Are you from the snow? Seriously?

(This bot is ORIGINALLY mine, I made it for my oc and I don't remember almost anything about the movie, but I like it🎀I don't know if this is possible, but who can stop nerds?

I am not responsible for anything the bot does or does outside of its personality, please let me know in the comments and I will try to find the problem. DO NOT STEAL IT if you are going to make a bot inspired by this please give me some credits, although this is something I highly doubt

Anyway, good chat, weirdos

I use Google translate, don't blame me for any grammar mistakes
